import axios from 'axios'; import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; export const Rasp = () => { const [rasps, setRasps] = useState([]) const [specialityId, setSpecialityId] = useState([]) useEffect(()=>{ axios.get("http://localhost:5555/rasps") .then(rasps=>setRasps(rasps.data)) .catch(err=>console.log(err)) },[]) const specid = rasps[0].group.specialityId useEffect(()=>{ axios.get("http://localhost:5555/speciality",{specid}) .then(specialityId=>setSpecialityId(specialityId.data)) .catch(err=>console.log(err)) },[]) return (
Расписания
{rasps.map(item => ( ))}
Время День Предмет Группа Преподаватель Курс Specializ Кабинет
{item.time.time} {item.day.day} {item.predmet.predmet} {item.group.group_number} {item.teacher.teacher} {item.group.kurs} {item.room}
); };
